1: For the waters are come in unto my my soul.
2: I am come into deep waters, where the floods overflow me.
3: Mine eyes fail while I wait for my God.
4: Then I restored that that which I took not away.
5: O God, thou knowest my foolishness; And my sins are not hid from thee.
6: Let not those that seek thee be confounded for my sake, O God of Israel.
8: And an alien unto my mother's children.
9: And the reproaches of them that reproached thee are fallen upon me.
11: And I became a proverb to them.
12: And I was was the song of the drunkards.
13: Hear me, in the truth of thy salvation.
14: Let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.
15: And let not the pit shut her mouth upon me.
16: Turn unto me according to the multitude of thy tender mercies.
18: Deliver me because of mine enemies.
19: Mine adversaries are are all before thee.
20: And I looked for some for some to take pity, but there was there was none; And for comforters, but I found none.
21: And in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.
22: let it become let it become a trap.
23: And make their loins continually to shake.
24: And let thy wrathful anger take hold of them.
25: And And let none dwell in their tents.
26: And they talk to the grief of those whom thou hast wounded.
27: And let them not come into thy righteousness.
28: And not be written with the righteous.
29: Let thy salvation, O God, set me up on high.
30: And will magnify him with thanksgiving.
31: Better than an ox or or bullock that hath horns and hoofs.
32: And your heart shall live that seek God.
34: The seas, and every thing that moveth therein.
35: That they may dwell there, and have it in possession.
36: And they that love his name shall dwell therein.
